_notation_legend.structure: each page has one or more 'songs'; each song has optional raag/taal/attribution header fields plus a list of stanzas
_notation_legend.stanza.marked: true if the stanza was set off in the book with a > or bullet marker (looks like a chorus/highlight convention used throughout) - kept as a flag rather than guessing at Carnatic terms like pallavi/anupallavi since the book mixes Hindustani, Kannada, and Hindi film songs
_notation_legend.attribution: whatever credit line appeared on the page - could be a movie name, album name, or a person's name (composer/singer)
_notation_legend.(2) markers: kept inline in the lyric text exactly as printed - indicates the line/phrase repeats twice when sung
_notation_legend.bracketed text: kept inline as printed, e.g. [Sa Pa] in the Tare Zameen Par song marks an echoed phrase
_notation_legend.title: some pages print a distinct song title (not a person/movie/album credit) above the taal line, e.g. 'HAM KO MANKI', 'ETANI SHAKTI' - kept in this optional field, separate from 'attribution' which is reserved for movie/album/composer credit lines.
_notation_legend.inline_sargam_lines: a few songs (Hind Desh Ke Nivasi p32, Janani Janma Bhoomi p38, the Saraswati vandana p45) print sargam solfa lines directly above/within the lyric stanza as a singing aid. Kept inline as their own line(s) in the stanza, exactly as printed, same convention as the '(2)' and bracketed-text markers.
_notation_legend.indexTitle: title/serial number pulled from the songbook's own handwritten INDEX page (front of book), added as a cross-reference tag alongside any 'title' already transcribed from the song's own page - kept separate rather than overwriting 'title' since the index sometimes abbreviates or spells a song name slightly differently than the page itself (e.g. index 'Itani shakti' vs page title 'Etani Shakti'). Matched to songs by sequential order (index entries 1-84 walk through the book's songs in the same order as the pages) rather than by the index's own page-number column, which was printed sideways/small and not reliably legible - the sequential match was cross-checked against several songs that already had a page-derived 'title' (Ham Ko Man Ki, Hind Desh Ke Nivasi, Hachevu Kannadada Deepa, Etani Shakti, Jaha Daal Daal) and lined up exactly, so confidence is high, but a couple of individual titles (deduced only from the index, no independent anchor) are worth a quick visual double-check.

source: Goonjan Kala Kendra - devotional & film song notebook
sourceImageConvention: each page has 'sourceImage': assets/songs/page_<label>.jpg where <label> matches the page number printed in the book (including '1A')

Manava hasirugolisuthihalu bhaava gange anudhina
Ileya koleya tholeyuthihalu thaayi thunge kshana kshana
Nelavidhemma paavana enithu dhanya jeevana
Naada gudiya mooru kadeya poreva shaantha saagara
Hindhu janara hradhayavindhu kshathra tejadhaagara
Spoorthi gouri shankara kaala yamanu kinkara
Devaa gananaayakaa paalaka devaa ganagaayaka paalaka
Kandu kai mugiyuve sondila devaa
Bramhaanda naayaka bramhaadi namita
Danda dandadaliha bhaktara kaayva
Eleyannu beleguve gowri puresha
Chaluvaa mahaakaaya kalimala naasha
Nalinaaksha priyasakha devaa vighneshaa
Gambheera gananaatha trijaga vikhyaata
Nambidavara deva nambide janaka
Bandu nee salaho devaa ganeshaa
Devi bhvuna mana mohini
Nirmala suriya karojwala dharani
Janaka janani janani
Neela sindhujala dowtha charana thala
Anila vikampitha shyaamalaanchana
Ambara chumbitha paala himaalaya
shubhra thushaara kireetini
Prathama prabhaatha uditha tava gagani
Prathama naama kava thava thapovana
Prathama prasaarithe thapovane bhuvane
Daana dharmajara kaavya vaahini
Devi bhajo durugaa bhavaani
Jagata janani mahishaasura mardhini
Himanaga nandini bhava bhaya bhanjini
Sura naarada muni mangala abhaye
Sharanaagata mi rakshaka daayini
Jayajaya mangala bhava bhaya haarini
Doora bahu dooraa hoguvaa baara
Allihudenna oora teeraa doora doora hoguva baaraa
Jalajaladalegala melkunidaadi balalike talalikegalannella doodi
Olavina maataadi hakkigalinchara keli aanandava taali
Hima mani kanakana sinchita anchina hasurina teetada melaadi
Olavina maataadi hakkigalinchara keli aanandava taali

songs.note: '[jaya]' and '/1' markers kept inline as printed

lines: Gopala radha lola murali lola nandalala [jaya]
Keshava madhava janardhana
Bana mala brundaavana maala /1
Ananda mohana niranjana
Bana maala brundaavana baala
Ekadantam gajaananam shoorpa katnam lambodaram
Herambham ganaadhipam sharanam sharanam gowri sutam
Suranara poojita shivasutane pramatha pratama suprajane
Siddhi buddhi dayakane harasai mudadi ganeshane
Grahapati jnaaniye gunaadyane tusti vrasti dayakane
Sharvaani suta prashaantane harasai mudadi gajamukhane
Shanmukha sodara shaashwatane vibhuda vishwa vanditane
Mangala mooruti maheshane harasai mudadi vighneshane
Ee namma taayi naadu nirupama laavanya beedu
Ee vanadhali nalidhulivaa kogilegelu naavu
Parvathagalalle higiya aagasadha nereya geleya
Raksheyavane namage avane maargadharshi
Ee thaaya madilinalli saasira nadhigale hariyuvavu
Ee sundhara nandhanake aa swargave karubuvudhu
Ee neladha dharmavandhu kalisadhu dhweshavanendhu
Bhaaratheeyaru naavu nammee dhesha bharatha naadu
Gajamukha ganapa namo gajaanana
Aadhi vandya sura nara poojithane
Siddhi buddhiyaraa muddhina kaanthaa
Siddhiya needemage vinaayaka
Vidhyeya karunisu buddhiya karunisu
Vigna vinaashakane vigneshane
Kaaryaarambhadhi kara mugivevu naav
Kaarya kaigoodisu nee mahaa kaayane
Bhajanaarambhadhi bhajipevu ninnanu
Jayavanu needemage ganeshane
Ganapathi ganapathi ganapathi om ganapathi
Karimukha kadubu priya karuni kadala ganapathi
Kava dheva ganapathi parama dhaiva ganapathi
Omkaara naadha ganapathi omkaara roopi ganapathi
Unde pididha kaigalu balu chandha baala ganapathi
Unde thindhu naliva namma muddhu baala ganapathi
Nanja kuvara ganapati gowri nanadha ganapati
Nalidhu nalidhu aaduvantha dollu hotte ganapati
Ghana shyama gopala Ghana shyama gopala
Mann mohana jagan mohana Yadhunandana gopal
Gopala gopala shyama gopala Gopala gopala sai gopala
Gajamukhane ganapathiye ninage vandane
Namdidavara baalina kalpatharu nine
Bhaadrapada shukladaa chauthiyandu
Ni mane manegu dayamaadi harasu yendu
Ninna sannidhaanadi thalebaagi kaiyamugidu
Beduvaa bhaktarige ni dhayaa Sindhu
Eerelu lokada anu anuvinaa
Ihaparadaa saa dhanake ni karana
Ninolume nothada ondu honnakirana
Nididare saakayya janma paavana
Paarvathi parashivana prema puthrane
Paalisuvaa paradaiva bere kaane
Paapada pankadali paduma yenisu yenna
Paada seveyonde dharama saadhana
Gaayiye ganapati jaga vandana
Shankara sumana bhavaani nandana
Siddhi sadana gajavadana vinaayak
Krapaa sindhu sundara sabalaayaka
Modaka priya muda mangaladaataa
Vidya vaaridhi buddhi pradhaataa
Maangata tulasidaasa karajore
Basahi raama siyaa maanasa more

songs.note: addressed to Vitthal/Pandurang, imagery of a horse

lines: Ghod tujhe roop deva ghod tujhe naama
Paanduranga paanduranga paanduranga naama
Ghod tujhe naama smarana ghod tujhe naama shravana
Raamakrishna raamakrishna raamakrishna naama
Pandarichaa vaara kari vittala naam ghajari
Shreehari vithevari kara kataavari
Janimane roopaa ghoda naama mane naama ghoda
Tukaa mane charan ghoda prabhu vittalaa

songs.note: handwritten swara annotations (SRGRS / SRMGRS / MPDGRS / MPDNDS) appear beside this song in the margin - not transcribed as they look like a practice scale note rather than part of the lyric. A fragment of a further song ('sha di / hin. / seva / tho') is obscured by a child's drawing at the bottom of the page and could not be read - re-check photo if that song matters.

lines: Gajamukha naa ninna naamava neneve
Nijavaagi karunisu varagala deva
Mooshika vaahana modhaka hasthaa
Paashaankushadhara kamala prashasthaa
Shyaamala varna vilambitha sootra
Vaamana roopa maheshwara puthra
Buddhi pradhaayaka pusthaka dhaari
Siddhi vinaayaka paadha namasthe
Vaarijodhbhava vinutha paraabuja
Gouriya varaputhra shree gananaayaka
Gopala gopala shyama gopala
Murali gaana lola gopi gopaala
Devaki nandana sundara venu gopaala
Oh raadhe raadhe raadhe raadhe raadhe gopala
Govinda Krishna hari om Gopala Krishna hari om
Govinda Krishna hari om raadhaa ramana hari om
Radha ko sangha murali bhajaave
Gopiyana ke sangha raas rachaave
Sab ko nachaave hari omm Gopala Krishna hari omm
Prem ke bas hi tu bhik jaave,
Drupad sutaa kee jhoot na khaave
Sab sukh pave hari omm Mann bhar aave hari omm
Aaja mann vaa tujh ko bhulaave
Nishdin gaave chainan pave
Tadapa bhulaave hari omm Thoda aave hari omm
Giridhar aage naachungi
Naach naach piva rasik rijhaun, premi jan ko jaachungi
Prem preeti kaa bandhi ghunghroo, surath ki kachani kaachhungi
Lok laaj kul ki maryaadaa, ya mein ek na raakhungi
Piva ke palanga jaa paudungi meera hari rang rachungi
Govardhana giridhari murari narayan gopala
Mukunda madhava murali dhaari naraayan gopala
Narayan gopala gaavon narayan gopala
Mukunda madhava murali dhaari naarayan gopaala
Yashodha mayya ki aakonka taaraa
Baala gwaala our makhan chora
Munijana vallabha brij kaa pyaara
Ghana shyaam Ghana shyaam
raadhe raadhe mohana ghanashyaama
Vasudeva sutha devaki nandana
Vandana daayaka bhandana mochana
Pragata bhaye tumh kaaraagruhaa mein
Chod ke sab aaram ghan shyaama
Khul gaye bandhan kaaraagruh ke
Chandana bansi taaraa mehke
Bhool gayi dukh maathaa devaki
Kar ke tumhe pranaam ghan shyama
Umadh pade baadal neeche ko
Umadi yamunaa pag choone ko
Jal gaavan mein nikhale jaayak
Sar par tumko dhaam Ghana shyaama
Raas rachaa kar brundaavana mein
Baite hai thulasi kaanan mein
Bana maala se poojitha shobhita
Bana maali abhiram Ghana shyaam
Nisha dhina tera darshana paakar
Nisha dhina teri mahima gaakar
Bhar do sevaa me mann mohana
Bheete aathoyan Ghana shyaam
Govinda maadhava gopaala keshava
Narasimhaachyuta naaraayana
Dasharatha nandana seetaa manohara
Daanava mardhana dayaanidhe
Raama raaghava raajeeva lochana Kaamita faladaa karivaradaa
Krishna keshava ambujalochana Kaamita faladaa karivaradaa
Raama raama govinda raama Kalyaana raama paahi
Shreeraama raama pattabhi raama Kodanda raama paahi jai jai
Raama raama nayanaabhi raama Lokaabhi raamaa paahi
Jaladhi shayana ravi chandravilochana Jalajabhavastuta shreeramaa
Kousalyaatmaja kaamita falada Maaruti sevita paahi
Raama raamaa paahi hare Raama raajaa paahi jai jai
Ghallu gallenuta gejje gallu thaajenuthaa
Ballida rangan balliya myaale chellidarokuliyo
Aredaru arishinavaa adake beredaru sunnavaa
Andavulla rangan myaale chellidaro kuliyo
Haalino kuliyo bale neeladokuliyo
Lolanaada rangan myaale haalino kuliyo
Thuppado kuliyo olle oppadokuliyo
Oppavulla rangan myaale tuppado kuliyo
Gandhadokuliyo olle chandadokuliyo
Andavulla rangan myaale gandhado kuliyo

songs.title: Ham Ko Man Ki Shakti Dena

lines: Hamko man ki shaki dena man vijay kare
Doosaronke jaise pehele khud ko jai kare
Bhed bhaav apane dil se saaf kar sakhe
Dostonse bhool hoto maaf kar sakhe
Jhoot se bache rahe sach kadam bhare
Doosaronke jaise pehele khud ko jai kare
Mushkile pade to ham pe itanaa karma kar
Saath detu dharma kaa challenge dharma par
Khud pe hosalaa rahe badi se naa dare
Doosaronke jaise pehele khud ko jai kare
Lalalaa lalalaa laalalalaa laalalalaa lalalalaa
He maatra bhoomi tere charanome sira namaavu
Mai bhakti benta apani tere sharan me laavu
Jis se sapoot upaje shreeraamakrishna jaise
Us teri dhooliko mai nij sheesh pai chadaavu
Sevaame teri saare bhedonko bhool jaavu
Vaha punya naam teraa pratidan sun sunaavu
Hara ganga jattadhara gowri shankara
Girijaa manoramana
Hara mratyunjaya mahadeva maheshwara
Mangala shubha charana
Nandi vaahana naagabhooshana
Nirupama gunasadana (saayi)
Natana manohara neelakanta saayi
Neerajadala nayana saayi

pages.note: continues the Shiva bhajan started at the bottom of page 27

lines: Hari sundara nanda mukunda hari naaraayana hari om
Hari keshava hari govinda hari naaraayana hari om
Vanamaali muralidhaari govardhana girivaradhaari
Nitnit kar maakhan chori
Aavore kaanhaare gokul ki pyaare
Gaavore naachore gokul ki pyaare
He shaaradhe maa he shaaradhe maa
Ajnaanathaase hame thaardhe maa
Thu swar ki dhevi sangeeth thujhase
Har shabdha theraa hai har geeth thujhse
Ham hai akhele ham hai adhoore
Theri sharan ham hame pyaar dhe maa
Dhuniyone samaji dhuniyone jaane
Vedhonki bhaashaa puraanonki vaani
Ham bhi tho samjhe ham bhi tho jaane
Vidhyaa ka ham ko adhikaar dhe maa
Thu swetha varni kamal par viraaje
Haatho me veenaa mukut sir saaje
Man se hamaare mitaake andhere
Ham ko jaano prasansaar dhemaa
Hemme nanage amma ninna thaayi endhu kareyalu
Kandhanemba ninna preethi saviyu jeniginthalu
Enu thane iddharu ninagu sirivsntharu
Balle naane iruvaresto ninagu dheemantharu
Gaali bandha garimeyalli yaaru samake baruvaru
Thaali nintha sahaneyalli ninna yaaru geluvaru
Praacheene enisidharu chira noothane neenu
Vedha moolavadha jnaana sudhege neenu jenu
Koti koti belaku arali ninna paadha tholedhive
Ninna kaanalendhe Chandra thaare nabhadhi neredhive
Thampu aaladhadige bandhu nintha bhaktha naanu
Melinindha kelagurulidha bitthavaadharenu
Nanna manadhi aralutthidhe thaaya ninna roopa
Kampu beeri sutthalella haradi niluva dhooap
Hari naaraayana hari naaraayana hari naaraayana bhajore
Shyaama sundhara madhana gopaala
Sachchidhaanandhaa saayi narayana
Gopi gopaalana gopi gopaalana gopi gopaalana bhajore
Jaya madhusoodhana hare madhusoodhana
Jaya madhusoodhana bhajore

songs.note: the \\word\\ markers are kept inline exactly as printed (an echo/repeat convention, similar to the '(2)' markers used elsewhere)

lines: Hennina janumake anna thammaru beku
Bennu thattuvaru sabheyolage \\savira\\
honna kattuvaru udiyolage
Enage yaarillantha manadhaaga marugidhare
Paranaadalobba prathisoorya \\nannanna\\
Bidhige chandhraama udhiyaadha
Maneya hindhala maavu nenedhaare ghammendhu
Nenedhanthe bandha nana anna \\baaleya\\
Goneyaange thola thiruootha
Saradhaara baruvaga suridhaavu mallige
Dhore nanna thamma baruvaaga \\yaalakki\\
Gone baagi haala suridhaavo
Anna baruthaanantha angalake kai kottu
Ranna battalige mane haaki\\kelenu\\
Thannagihare thavaravaru
Haadondhu moodithu manasinolagondhu
Chukka chalaadidha aakaasha kandu
Snehadhaa notadhali hareyadhaa selethaa
Dhesha kaalagalaache saaguvaa thavaka
Hogeya musukinolagaache aanandha vadhana
Benki hagalallu nudivudoo nayana
Kadhana kalahagalallu jigiyuvaa badhuku
Moodi baruvudhu untu anupama nasuku
Raga dhwesha kahi bhaavagala mugilu
Karagi surisuvudhu olavina honalu
Kallu kambagalu araluvaa kanasu
Achala kshanagalu seri ondhaadha manasu
Himagiriya shrangaa dheva nadhi gangaa
Manadhali moodipa bhaava vinoothana anupama utthungaa
Dhivya sanaathana samskrathige vedha puraanave saakshigalu
Hindhuvinunnathi avanathige saakshi himaadriya shakharagalu
Anjuva edheyali dhairyadhi panjanu urisuva manjina mahalugalu
Aa sura lokava meerisuvaa naadige dhumukidha bhaagirathai
Bhaaratha maatheya sangadhali dhanyalu enisiha bhaagyavathi
Hindhu dheshadha kana kana janamana paavanagolisiha punyavathi
Sole geluvina sopssna dhudukadhe nade nee jopaana
Novali nandhiha bandhuvige needutha dhairya samaadhanaa
Maatheya gourava rakshanegaagi mudupaagiralemmaya praana
Hakki chilipili hadidavu rekke bichchi haradidavu
Hombale suli holedavo sulangi tene balu balukyavo
Tangaali toogo hottinage kembare myage swami moodyano
Koti kirana beeri gattinage hunnesara dandetti horataane
Tavare kantereyo vyalage swami nammappa nadedano
Ibbani tabbida ileyage dyaaru jatreya nadesyano
SRM-M-M- RMP-P-P- NPNPM-PM R-S-
MPN-N-N- PNS-S-S- N-SNP-NPM-R-S-
Hind desh ke nivaasi sabhi jana ek hai
Ranga roopa vesh bhaashaa chaahe anek hai
Belee gulaab juhi champaa chameli
Pyaare pyaare fool goonche maalaame ek hai
Koyal ki kook nyaari papiyonki desh pyaari
Gaan hi taranaa bulbul raag magar ek hai
Ganga yanuma bramhaputra Krishna kaaveri
Jaake milgaye saagar me hui sab ek hai
Hachevu kannadada deepa Hachevu kannadada deepa
Karunaada deepa sirinudiya deepa olavetti toruvaa deepaa aa..
Bahudinagalinda maimaraveyinda koodiruva koleyaa kochevu
Yellelli kannadada kampu soosalu Allalli karanaa chaachevu
Nadu naade irali gadinaade irali kannadada kaleyaa kechevu
Maretevu mareva teredevu manava eredevu olavaa hidi nenapaa
Naranaravanellaa hurigulisi hosedu hachevu kannadada deepa
Kalpaneya kannu harivanaka saalu deepa gala belakaa beerevu
Hachiruva deepadali taaya roopa Achaliyadante koredevu
Odalodala kechinaa kidigalannu gadinaadinaachae thoorevu
Hommiralu preeti yelliyadu bheeti naadolave neethi hidi nenapaa
ManemanegaLalli manamanagaLalli hachchevu kannaDada deepa
Nammavarugalisida hesarulisalu ellaru ondoo goodevu
Nammedeyu midiyuvee maathinalli mateyanu pooje maadevu
Nammusiru teeduve naadinalli maangalya geehtaa haadevu
thoredevu marula kadedevu irula padedevu thirula hidinenapaa
Karulemba kudige minchanna mudisi hachevu kannadada deepa
Hullina budadali huttida devaru beledanu chigurutha bettadali
Belagina bisilali holedanu aralutha hoogala Melina muththinali
Hoovina odalali hurulaagiddhanu gandhava chellutha gaaliyali
Paraaga kanadali anuvanthiddava vasageya besedanu sparshadali
Maragal tongeya thudiyali onagutha iddanu beejada roopadali
Suriyalu jadimale biddhanu mannali eddanu chigurutha molakeyali
Suduvanu odalali hasivina benkiya sudadanthiruvanu manninali
Mounada koralali maathaagiruvanu nudivanu midiyutha haadinali
He jajani jagadhambe ninnadige sharanembe
Maargadhali bandhenna saadhanege anuvaagu
Moorjagava paalisuthe sootradhaarini maathe
Poojisuthe praarthisuthe baaluvevu naavmundhe
Girijaathe ninnadiya nambiruva bhaktharige
Neralindha maremaadu mareyalaarevu thaaye
Karuneyali neenoliye kallu karaguvudhamma
Uraga suthe nee muniye branhandaviradhamma
Itani shakti hame dena data mankaa vishwaas kamjor honaa
Ham chale nek raste pe hamse bhool karbhi koyi bhool honaa
Dur ajnaan ke ho andhere tu hame jnaan ki roshani de
Har buraayi se bachate rahe ham jitani bhi de bali jindagi de
Bhair honaa kiseekaa kisise bhaavanaa manme badaleki hotaa
Ham chale nek rastepe hamse bhool karbhi koyi bhool honaa
Ham na soche hame kyaa milaahai ham ye soche kiyaa kyaahai arpan
Fool khushiyonki baate sabhi ko sabkaa jeevanhi banjaaye madhuban
Apani karunaa kaa jal tu bahaade karde paavan har ikman kaa konaa
Ham chale nek raste pe hamse bhool karbhi koyi bhool honaa
Ham andhereme hai roshani de khonaa de khudko hi dushmani se
Ham sajaa paaye apane kiye ki mouth bhi hoto sehle khushise
Kal jo guzaraahai firse na gizre aanevaalaa vo kal aisaa honaa
Ham chale nek raste pe hamse bhool karbhi koyi bhool honaa

songs.note: well-known film song (Shree 420) - book gives no credit line

lines: Ichak dana bichak dana Dane upar dana ichak dana
Chhajje upar ladaki nache Ladaka hai diwaana ichak dana
Chhoti si chhokari Lalbayi nam hai
Pehne woh ghaghra Ek paisa dam hai
Munh me sabake aag Lagaye aata hai Rulana ichak dana
Ek janwar aisa jisake Dum par paisa
Sar pe hai taj bhi Badshah ke jaisa
Badal dekhe chham Chham nache albela Mastana ichak dana
Jahaa daal daal par sone ki chidiyaa karati hai baseraa
O bhaarat desh hai meraa o bhaarat desh hai meraa
Jahaa satya ahimsaa our dharma kaa pag pag lagataa deraa
O bhaarat desh hai meraa o bhaarat desh hai meraa
jai bharati jai bharati jai bharati jai bharati

Hari om hari om hari om hari om

our radhaa ika ika baalaa

O bhaarat desh hai meraa o bhaarat desh hai meraa
Jahaa gangaa jamunaa Krishna our kaaveri beheti jaaye

ye amarit pilavaayee
Kahi ye jal fal our fool ugaaye kesar kahi bikheraa
O bhaarat desh hai meraa o bhaarat desh hai meraa
Alabelenki is dharati ke tyohaar bhi hai alabele
Kahi deevaali ki jagamaga hai holi ke kahi mele
holi ke kahi mele
Jahaa raag rang our hasi khushikaa chaaro orahai gheraa
O bhaarat desh hai meraa o bhaarat desh hai meraa

Govri suta aanandita vadana

Baanjhan Ko Putra Det, Nirdhan Ko Maaya

Teree mahima -3 sabse pyaree pyaree hari hari
Alakha niranjan bhava bhaya bhanjana, janama niranjana data

Tune lakho kee naiya tari tari hari hari

Do akshar kaa shabdha hari hai lekin bada salona
Usane sankata tali bhari bhari hari hari

pages.note: continues the bhajan started at the bottom of page 36

lines: Jalala jalala jaladhare suvi suvvale jole
Dhoni dhumbale mele jaane jammela jole
Jalala jalala jaladhare
Nanna jotheyaagi haadu haayaagi kogile maagi kogile
Thaala himmela mela mimmela neerale navile aadale
Binka binnana bedagu bigumaana balle ambaale bale
Hammu kannota thumbu maimaata manchale chaluve chanchale
Branga saaranga singa maathanga naagale lalane neenele
Hamsa nadedhanthe honalu haridhanthe haayi harigola leele
Jo jo baalakrishna jogulava haadutthaa thooguve naa
Jo joo joo joo yaadavanandhana joo joo
Navarathna thumbida thotthila katti
Muruga mallige jaaji hoogala chelli
Nalku vedagalemba sarapaliya katti

chalata hai maharauli mein par ghoda apana arabi hai
